item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description:
What's New in 1.0.2

  • Fix: auto-retry on signaling failure during initial connect
  • Fix: prevent duplicate keyboard hide events
  • Fix: navigation crash, cold-start retry, suspend debounce
  • Fix: TIS/TSM main thread crash on macOS 26
  • Perf: stall detection and frame recording optimization
  • Feat: robust client configuration system
  • Feat: host capture optimization, keyboard layout mapper
  • Feat: click count support in data channel
  • Feat: Mac model detection for device icons
  • Compat: macOS 15+ deployment target support

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
What's New in 1.0.1

  • ✨ In-app auto-updates — Sparkle 2 integration for seamless updates
  • 🔧 Sleep prevention — Display stays awake during active streaming sessions
  • 🖥️ Cursor tracking fixes — Fixed cursor update after client disconnect
  • 🔄 Screen capture lifecycle — Fixed persistent recording icon when not streaming
  • ⌨️ Keyboard improvements — Reduced notification spam during session takeover
  • 📋 Clipboard sync — Fixed cross-app clipboard detection on iPad
  • 📊 Log export optimization — Reduced memory usage for large log files
